title: Spicy Middle Eastern Shakshuka
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on the classic North African dish, featuring lamb and a rich tomato sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the spicy pepper flakes, cumin, and salt and pepper to taste. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and stir to combine. Cook for 2 minutes.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and season with salt and pepper. Pour the eggs over the lamb mixture.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
